mutators.name: createQuantity
mutators.semantics: Appends the initial revisioned quantity record and returns its handle; its entity ID uses replica-scoped client id (prefix_replicaId~counter); collision-free by construction, no merge step needed.

mutators.name: reviseQuantity
mutators.semantics: Appends a new quantity revision containing measure, fractional value, units, label, and other revisioned fields; all revisions remain observable and concurrent field values converge by the runtime's HLC/LWW projection rule.

mutators.name: createQuantityType
mutators.semantics: Appends a quantity-type record that can participate in default-type selection.
mutators.derived_from: invented: quantity types must be event-backed revisioned records in the local-first runtime although no single listed source method creates them.

mutators.name: reviseQuantityType
mutators.semantics: Appends a quantity-type revision; competing offline revisions are retained and its effective fields converge through the runtime's HLC/LWW projection rule.

mutators.name: setLogTypeDefaultQuantityType
mutators.semantics: Appends the per-log-type default quantity-type setting, where null or an empty effective setting permits fallback selection.
mutators.derived_from: invented: the source helper reads configuration, but the event-log target must expose configuration changes as append-only events.

mutators.name: stageAddLogAssets
mutators.semantics: Appends the actor's pending add-log selection without creating a log; a later staging event for that actor supersedes rather than merges the earlier selection.

mutators.name: createActivityLogFromPending
mutators.semantics: Appends an activity log from the actor's staged selection, retaining a multi-valued asset collection and zero or more revision-specific quantity references.

mutators.name: cloneActivityLog
mutators.semantics: Appends a cloned activity log and newly created duplicate quantities for every source quantity reference, with the clone referring to those duplicates rather than the originals.

mutators.name: deleteQuantity
mutators.semantics: Appends deletion plus auditable removal revisions for every log containing every matching reference to the quantity, removing all such references and recording the removal message on each affected log revision.

mutators.name: deleteActivityLog
mutators.semantics: Appends deletion of the log and deletion of every quantity it references, even when another log also references one of those quantities; ensuing quantity deletion cleanup removes those references from remaining logs.

mutators.name: migrateQuantityItems
mutators.semantics: Only array input produces one validated quantity event per item; mapped non-null item values override outer-row fallbacks and write to mapped nested paths, while an invalid assembled item allocates no ID and raises MigrateSkipRowError with its violation path and message.
mutators.derived_from: invented: migration quantity assembly and validation are process-plugin behavior not named by a listed subsystem member.

projections.name: getActivityLog
projections.semantics: Returns the disclosed, viewable log state at or before asOf, including all retained assets and its multi-valued quantity references pinned to their recorded quantity revisions; returns null when deleted, undisclosed, or not viewable.

projections.name: getActivityLogsForAsset
projections.semantics: Returns the disclosed, viewable activity logs that reference the asset at or before asOf.

projections.name: getFirstActivityLogForAsset
projections.semantics: Returns the first disclosed, viewable matching activity log under the source log-query ordering at or before asOf, or null if none exists.

projections.name: getPendingAddLogAssets
projections.semantics: Returns the actor's latest staged asset IDs at or before asOf filtered to assets viewable by that actor under the disclosure/view projection; non-viewable selected assets are omitted.

projections.name: getQuantity
projections.semantics: Returns the disclosed quantity state and revision history at or before asOf; QuantityView.publicLabel is the quantity entity ID, never its stored label field.

projections.name: renderQuantityPlainText
projections.semantics: Renders the quantity's text at or before asOf by decoding HTML entities, stripping tags, trimming edge whitespace, and collapsing internal whitespace; returns null when not visible or deleted.

projections.name: resolveDefaultQuantityType
projections.semantics: Returns the non-empty per-log-type configured default first; otherwise returns the module fallback type when available, otherwise the ordered arbitrary available type, or null when no type exists.

rationale: Activity-log, quantity, configuration, staging, clone, and deletion operations are append-only domain events; all changing state is read through as-of projections. QuantityRevisionInput includes revisioned measure, fractional value, units, stored label, and renderable text; QuantityRevisionReference contains a QuantityHandle plus QuantityRevisionHandle; ActivityLogInput contains activity-log fields; QuantityFieldMapping describes an item path, outer-row fallback path, and destination nested path. The pending-selection projection captures the later view-access filter, with visibility enforced by disclosure/projection rather than a central authority. Deletion operations are composite replayable events so the source's inverse cleanup and deletion cascades are auditable. Quantity revisions and quantity-type revisions preserve concurrent histories while their effective materialized values converge.
